title: eBPF (Extended Berkeley Packet Filter)
description: Master the capabilities of eBPF for deep system-level observability in cloud-native environments. Utilize eBPF-based tools (e.g., Cilium/Hubble) to gain visibility into network flows and system calls without code modification.
objectives: Master the capabilities of eBPF for deep system-level observability in cloud-native environments.
Utilize eBPF-based tools (e.g., Cilium/Hubble) to gain visibility into network flows and system calls without code modification.
